AppearanceUpdate.description:
Appearance publish (P7.1) — gated by the branding permission, not tenant_config.

`splash` is validated server-side (enums rejected on write, duration clamped 1800–3000,
logo must be a tenant-owned media key); `navigation_style` writes `navigation.style`
(sibling of tabs — the tab structure is never touched here).
AppearanceUpdate.title: AppearanceUpdate

AuditLogPage.description: Cursor-paginated audit feed (M2). `next_cursor` is opaque; pass it back as `cursor`.
AuditLogPage.title: AuditLogPage

ConciergeConsentIn.description: Concierge consent (separate from location_consent): stored origin for drive-time math.
ConciergeConsentIn.title: ConciergeConsentIn

ConciergeEnvelope.description: Uniform envelope for every concierge answer, so mobile renders one way.
ConciergeEnvelope.title: ConciergeEnvelope

ManifestCenterAction.description: The emphasized center action (Option B: Scan/Play with a wallet fallback).
ManifestCenterAction.title: ManifestCenterAction

ManifestConcierge.description: Concierge persona (P6.4) — public persona only; weights/guardrails stay server-side.
ManifestConcierge.title: ManifestConcierge

ManifestNavTab.description:
One bottom-nav tab. Fields default to empty so a corrupt stored tab can never 500 the
manifest endpoint — the app drops unknown/empty keys and falls back to Option B.
ManifestNavTab.title: ManifestNavTab

ManifestOut.description: The versioned, resolved tenant manifest — fully typed into the contract (M6).
ManifestOut.title: ManifestOut

ManifestSplash.description: Resolved splash block (P7.1) — always present with safe defaults (variant `silk`).
ManifestSplash.title: ManifestSplash

ManifestTheme.description:
Design tokens (mirrors design/tokens.json). The app deep-merges these over its bundled
defaults, so every group is optional.
ManifestTheme.title: ManifestTheme

PlayerRgOut.description: Admin view of a player's responsible-gaming state.
PlayerRgOut.title: PlayerRgOut

PreviewIn.description: Admin what-if preview (P6.4): run the brief for a seed player with candidate weights.
PreviewIn.title: PreviewIn

RgFlagsUpdate.description:
Full desired RG state for a player (audit H2). An all-clear body removes every flag.

The stored shape matches what the concierge guardrail reads
(``concierge/service.py::rg_restriction``): ``self_exclusion`` bool, ``cool_off_until``
ISO datetime, ``limits`` mapping.
RgFlagsUpdate.title: RgFlagsUpdate

TenantConfigUpdate.description: Partial update — only provided fields change.
TenantConfigUpdate.title: TenantConfigUpdate

WalletTransactionOut.description: Ledger row for the history view (adds the DB-managed timestamp).
WalletTransactionOut.title: WalletTransactionOut

info.summary: White-label casino player platform — backend (modular monolith).
info.title: Player Mobile App API

schema.title: Response Account Activity Api V1 Account Activity Get

post.description:
Player-audience event sink (P2.9 sink, P6.7 metrics). Unknown types are dropped, not
stored — the response says so instead of erroring, so clients can fire-and-forget.

get.description: Cursor-paginated audit feed (M2). Pass the response's `next_cursor` back as `cursor`.

schema.title: Response Player Otp Request Api V1 Auth Player Otp Request Post

get.description: Recent concierge answers for the tenant (the studio's audit view).

schema.title: Response Recent Answers Api V1 Concierge Answers Get

post.description: Free-form question; answered from tool context, rendered as signal cards + sources.

get.description: Use case 1 — 'Should I visit?' Home-hero payload.

post.description:
Explicit opt-in for stored-origin travel math (GOLDEN RULE #8 — consent + audit).

Revoking consent also clears the stored origin — we never keep location data the player
hasn't consented to using.

schema.title: Response History Api V1 Concierge History Get

get.description: Use case 2 — top 5–10 ranked offers, each with machine-readable why_you reasons.

post.description: Use case 3 — deterministic itinerary (leave time, first stop, offer order, dinner).
What-if brief for a seed player with candidate weights — no cache, no audit row.

put.description:
Publish splash / navigation-style appearance (P7.1) — branding-gated, audited, and the
write bumps the manifest version so apps re-fetch with no rebuild (golden rule #5).

get.description: Return the resolved, versioned manifest for the tenant (public; cache-friendly via ETag).

schema.title: Response Get Themes Api V1 Config Themes Get

post.description: Return a simulated cardless-play pairing session for an EGM.

patch.description:
Set/clear a player's responsible-gaming flags — permission-gated and audited (H2).

The concierge guardrail and player-facing flows read these flags; an all-clear body
removes them.
